versioning_policy.major: breaking schema, lifecycle, SLA, redaction, linked-entity, visibility, permission or API change
versioning_policy.minor: new backward-compatible category, queue, report, screen, SLA metric or workflow extension
versioning_policy.patch: bug fix, validation update, copy/config correction
versioning_policy.ticket_versioning: Ticket events are append-only; sensitive edits use redaction/supersession records.

_meta.generator_note: Semantic compiled module spec; not a CSV-row wrapper.
